feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: BAS : "code: not found"
entry.content:
Hi @yannmiquel,

Edit: The original answer seems to have only worked temporarily for some reason. What works for the duration of the terminal session at least seems to be running "export GIT_EDITOR=vim" to bring up vim for editing commit messages.

---

Original answer:

What worked for me was to disable VS Code as terminal git editor. Git then just warns me about merge conflicts and asks to resolve them manually, which is fine for me because I'll do that in VS Code / BAS Source Control view anyway.

Warning: I was not able to make VS Code / BAS open any editor though, even after re-enabling that setting.

In BAS:

  • open settings (e.g. via "Preferences: Open Settings (UI)")
  • search for setting "Terminal Git Editor" (setting id "git.terminalGitEditor")
  • disable that setting
  • restart / open new terminal

On merge conflicts git now only shows this message:

 

 

Auto-merging test.txt
CONFLICT (content): Merge conflict in test.txt
Automatic merge failed; fix conflicts and then commit the result.

 

 

Kind regards,
Tobias

entry.title: How to Fetch Logged-In User Details Using SAP User API in Cloud Foundry?
entry.content:
Hi Community! 

I'm currently working on an SAP project deployed in Cloud Foundry, and I'm trying to fetch the logged-in user's details using the User API. My setup includes an xs-app.json with a route to /userapi/currentUser.

Here's what I'm trying to achieve:
Retrieve the user's full name and user ID.

entry.title: Cannot deploy SAP HANA Database Artifact
entry.content:
Hello,

I am following the tutorial below.

Create Calculation View in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Tutorials

And when I go through step 4 and try to deploy the Database Artifact, I got this error:


Prepared environment for deployment
npm WARN config production Use `--omit=dev` instead.
deploy@ /home/user/projects/kuberlin/db
├── @SAP/hana-client@2.22.32
└── @SAP/hdi-deploy@5.3.2


> start
> node node_modules/@sap/hdi-deploy/deploy.js --exit

VCAP_SERVICES: undefined
Deployment ended at 2024-12-09 13:28:24
Error: service ${service-name} not found; the service definition does not exist.
(0s 42ms)


* The terminal process "/bin/bash '-c', 'echo 'Prepared environment for deployment' && (npm ls --depth 0 --production || npm install) && (npm start -- --exit)'" terminated with exit code: 1.

 

Does anybody know what I am missing?

Thanks a lot.

Regards

entry.title: Planning for the Future: Insights on Transitioning from SAP C4C Sales Service Cloud V1 to V2
entry.content:
As we step into 2025, we are actively planning for the future of our SAP CX landscape and evaluating the transition from C4C V1 to V2. Currently, we have a globally live SAP C4C system with a mix of medium to complex PDI developments.

We are eager to hear from others who have successfully made this shift! Specifically, we’d love to learn about:

  • Your migration journey: How was the process of transitioning from V1 to V2?
  • Required tools and skills: What expertise did your team need? Did you leverage any specific tools or frameworks for the transition?
  • Change management strategies: How did you handle change management, both for development processes and for end-users?

For context, our team has solid experience Technically with : SAP CI (aka CPI), Kyma, and a basic understanding of BAS and CAP and 

Functionally : Lead to Order Processes.

We are looking for holistic insights into the implementation, challenges, and best practices for maintaining and optimizing the system post-migration.

Looking forward to engaging discussions and learning from your experiences!

Best regards,
Dhruvin

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: CAP Fiori Application filter query length exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are developing a CAP Fiori application that displays a read-only report. The application retrieves data via an OData V4 service exposed from an ABAP backend.
 
The issue arises when user applies filters in the report. Since the backend metadata contains around 50 columns, the resulting query sometimes exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit. As a result, the request automatically changes from GET to POST.
 
Although we include the CSRF token in the headers, the backend OData service responds with a "403 CSRF token missing" error when it receives the POST request. It seems the backend expects a CSRF token due to the method change but doesn"t recognize the token being sent.
 
Could you please advise on how to handle this situation or configure the system to avoid such errors?

 

Many Thanks,

Manoj

entry.title: Possible Issue with SAP Fiori Generator v1.16.0 (OData V4 Service Detection)
entry.content:
Hello @SAPSupport ,

I'm experiencing unexpected behavior with the SAP Fiori Generator (@sap/generator-fiori version 1.16.0) in the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) when trying to create a List Report application based on an OData V4 UI service. Even though I'm selecting an OData V4 service, the generator seems to be defaulting to V2 templates, causing the generated application to render only a blank page.

Is this a known issue, or is there a workaround to ensure the generator adheres to OData V4 templates?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance on resolving this behavior.

Best regards,

entry.title: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app generation broken for RAP-based OData V4 service
entry.content:
Hi,

Environment details:

Backend - SAP S4HANA 2022 FPS02

SAP Business Application Studio Version: 1.93.1
UI5 Version 1.108.30

I am encountering a strange issue in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) while generating a Fiori List Report for a RAP-based OData V4 service. Despite the service being explicitly defined and recognized as OData V4, BAS/Fiori Tools incorrectly treat it as an OData V2 service and generate faulty configurations.

This issue affects all my previously deployed V4 services, which worked successfully earlier. However, when redeploying these services as duplicate apps for testing, BAS incorrectly interprets them as V2 services. As a result, the generated application is broken and fails to function both during preview in BAS and after deployment.

The app fails to load with the following errors:
"[ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed"

"Invalid metadata document."

It is important to note that the same application and service work perfectly fine when previewed locally through Eclipse, which confirms that both the app and the generated OData V4 service, metadata are correct. 

Is anyone else facing a similar problem? App generation and deployment has worked absolutely fine in the past with the exact same steps.

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Business Application Studio project generated from wizard with errors with oDAta V4
entry.content:
Hi team 

We are trying to create apps in "Business Application Studio" on the BTP platform, but since this week we are finding that the wizard to create apps was updated and is generating the UI5 ​​project code with errors such as representing oData V4 as V2

the app created doesn't works

it has errors

the odata V4 was taken as V2

we need correct this issue because we don't have a way to modify our apps ui5.
Has anyone had the same problem? Or have you found any solution?

Regards!

entry.title: BAS: BTP ABAP Environment trial services are not loaded
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am trying to generate a Fiori application based on an OData service developed in the BTP ABAP Environment (trial). However, when I select the destination, the generator keeps loading the services.

I don't see any network request, but I saw the following messages in the console. 

Is anyone else experiencing the same issue?

Update:

I have executed the command below, which was successful.

`curl -v -i "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-b0f2992ctrial-dev.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/RecommendedSer
viceCollection?%24top=1"`

entry.title: How to mashup and combine external entity with custom entity for BTP CAP?
entry.content:
I have constructed SBS application which consumes the external service data using destination from SaaS SAP system. Now I would like to use some custom properties of my own together with ready entity definition from external service. Unfortunately, I have error when I try to combine. Using "extend" or "extend projection" does not work either.

Is there anyway how to fix this issue? Thanks.

Entity definition:

entity getPromoCustom as select from ex.Promotions {
    key promotionID,
    promotionName,
};
extend getPromoCustom with {
    salesOrg   : String(4);
    distChain  : String(4);
};
 
Error:
Use ‘extend projection’ to add select items to the query entityCDS (compiler)(extend-query)

entry.title: Error accessing Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello Community
When accessing my Business Application Studio, I am getting an error (see attachment) informing me that I should click on the "Extend Free Trial" button, but I can't find it on the screen. Another option was to delete the account and recreate it. Does anyone have a step-by-step guide on how to do this? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Issue importing edmx file when the file contains SAP__common.IsCurrency annotation.
entry.content:
Only happens in VSCode and this is the error that I get. Says that there's no metadata factory provided and it can't resolve com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1. Other Common annotations don't seem to have this problem.

Tried it in BAS and it is able to import. Did a `cds -v` to check both environments, they are similar. Maybe I'm missing additional references? Version problem?

entry.title: Previewing Fiori Standard Extension Project on BAS
entry.content:
Do anyone know how can I preview an Extension Project on SAP Business Application Studio ?
I manage to preview other custom Fiori Apps, but cant preview any of the Extension Projects of Standard Fiori Projects, such as Look Up Retail Products.
Is there a version prerequisite or any steps that was missing ?

Many Thanks.

entry.title: SAP BAS mta app local run with calls to SAP B1 db return 403 1/3 and work fine 2/3, work if deployed
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have an MTA app in SAP Business Application Studio, and I want to run it locally (localhost) for my JavaScript development.

 

This application is connected to a destination on the BTP to get data from the SAP B1 database (on-premise database) via B1if.

 

I am experiencing an issue with my AJAX calls to the SAP B1 database (using a destination defined in my BTP Cloud Foundry environment).

 

To log into my SAP BAS environment, I use the default SAP Identity Provider.

 

Please find attached some useful information about my destination, my BTP environment, and my BAS configuration, HAR file.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Explanation:

 

The calls work fine for the first/second requests, but for the third call, I get a 403 Forbidden error each time.

 

This issue only occurs in the local environment/execution of the BAS MTA application. Once the application is deployed, everything works fine. However, this is not practical for our IT development.

 

I have tested the calls in Postman, and all the calls work fine, just like the deployed version of my app.

 

I have noticed that during the local execution of my application, an "ARBE" cookie is automatically set and sent with the request.

 

I have no control over the generation, deletion, or use of this cookie (http only).

 

Example:

 

To give you a clean view of my issue, I ran an example where I execute three AJAX calls to the SAP B1 database locally—two succeed and one fails with a 403 error. The ARBE cookie is generated and sent with each call.

 

Building and deploying the application for every update, testing, and logging are very time-consuming. I hope you can help me find a solution.

According to "Collect Logs for SAP Business Application Studio Issues":

Here is the information:

  • BAS Local URL: https://port8080-workspaces-ws-z4v2q.eu10.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html

Date and time the issue occurred: 04/12/2024 17:57

The browser console logs can be found in the attachment with the HAR file (log_browser2, HAR_file_of_the_process2(to heavy for be here, can be send by mail if you need it).

The extension installation log is available in the attachment (install_logs_BAS.txt).

I had already oppened a case on the SAP services and maintenance Dashboard (https://me.sap.com/cases/002075129500013387192024) and after a call the support redirected me here, so i hope fine a solution for my issue. 

Thanks in advance for any help.

Best regards,

Arthur, Product Owner.

entry.title: Enabling Access to SAP UI5 Applications for Non-BTP Users
entry.content:
I have developed an SAP UI5 application in Business Application Studio (BAS) and deployed it to Cloud Foundry. The application is now visible under HTML5 Applications in the SAP BTP Cockpit. I would like to understand how users without an SAP BTP account can access this application. Specifically, is it possible for users created in SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) to access this UI5 application?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Can't choose Cloud Foundry when create Project in BAS
entry.content:
When I create new Project BAS, if I choose Data source = Connect to a System, can't choose Cloud Foundry in deployment configuration.

As I created before I can choose Cloud Foundry.

Could you please help me to solve this issue?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Git: /bin/bash: warning: setlocale: LC_ALL: cannot change locale (en_US.UTF-8)
entry.content:
When trying to commit my Fiori project to Git from SAP Business Application Studio, I'm getting the following error:

"Git: /bin/bash: warning: setlocale: LC_ALL: cannot change locale (en_US.UTF-8)"

Any idea how I get round this?

entry.title: BAS deploy UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using BAS to deploy a own developed SAP Fiori App to a backend system. (ECC + gateway in one system)

Deployment goes well, even if there are errors in the logs. (so cannot really complain about that)

but... when i change something in the frontend and want to redeploy i get a success messages saying its ok i can see the changes in the transport have run all refresh programs as your suppost to nut the changes do not take effect. i have also tried to undeploy and it gets "deleted". deploying under same name just give me the old version (that was suposibly deleted) even though depolyment was a success.

The only way to get the new app to deploy with the new content is to deploy under a different name. 

this is really not a solution 😕

has anyone had the same problem who found out what i am doing wrong?

It is a normal Fiori freestyle APP not using elements

br Lisa

entry.title: Customising fiori applications by coding
entry.content:
So I want to write add a code in existing fiori app called "Manage assignements" wherein a button is to be desabled after reading a input screen and if the input screen matches a particular value. This code is working in the console in inspect tab at runtime. 

What we want to achive is to integrate this javascript code to the fiori app itself by default. Is it possible? What efforts are required?

 

(function() {
    function disableButtonIfConditionMet() {
        var inputElement = document.getElementById("application-DataSetMatchingAssignment-manage-component---worklist--smartFilterbar-filterItemControl_BASIC-DISP_GROUP-inner");
        var buttonElement = document.getElementById("application-DataSetMatchingAssignment-manage-component---worklist--btnAssign");
 
        if (inputElement && buttonElement) {
            if (inputElement.value === "1520 (Trading Partner balance)") {
                buttonElement.disabled = true;
            } else {
                buttonElement.disabled = false;
            }
        }
    }
 
    // Run the function initially
    disableButtonIfConditionMet();
 
    // Set an interval to run the function every second
    setInterval(disableButtonIfConditionMet, 1000);
})();

 

@SAPSupport SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori Makers
